title: Visualization of integrin molecules by fluorescence imaging and techniques.
author: Cai C Sun H Hu L Fan Z
content: S-EPMC8249084 PMC8249084 Visualization of integrin molecules by fluorescence imaging and techniques. Integrin molecules are transmembrane αβ heterodimers involved in cell adhesion, trafficking, and signaling. Upon activation, integrins undergo dynamic conformational changes that regulate
